
:::{#lem-d_logodds-d_odds}

#### Derivative of log-odds by odds

$$\derivf{\logodds}{\odds} = \odds^{-1}$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using [the definition of log-odds](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#def-logodds):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\logodds}{\odds}
&= \deriv{\odds}\log{\odds}
\\
&= \odds^{-1}
\ea
$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

:::{#thm-d_logodds-d_odds}

#### Derivative of log-odds by odds

$$\derivf{\logodds}{\odds} = \frac{1-\pi}{\pi}$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using [odds as a function of probability](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#thm-prob-to-odds) and @lem-d_logodds-d_odds:

$$
\ba
\derivf{\logodds}{\odds}
&= \odds^{-1}
\\
&= \frac{1-\prob}{\prob}
\ea
$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

:::{#thm-d_logodds-d_prob}

#### Derivative of log-odds by probability

$$\derivf{\logodds}{\prob} = \frac{1}{(\prob)(1-\prob)}$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using @thm-d_logodds-d_odds, @thm-deriv-odds, and the [chain rule](math-prereqs.qmd#thm-chain-rule):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\logodds}{\prob}
&= \derivf{\logodds}{\odds} \derivf{\odds}{\prob}
\\
&= \frac{1-\prob}{\prob} \frac{1}{\sqf{1-\prob}}
\\
&= \frac{1}{(\prob)(1-\prob)}
\ea
$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

:::{#cor-deriv-logit}

#### Derivative of logit function

$$\logit'(\prob) = \frac{1}{(\prob)(1-\prob)}$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using [log-odds via the logit function](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#cor-logodds-logit) and @thm-d_logodds-d_prob:

$$
\ba
\logit'(\prob)
&= \deriv{\prob} \logitf{\prob}
&& \text{(Lagrange notation rewritten in Leibniz notation)}
\\ &= \deriv{\prob} \logodds
&& \text{(log-odds via the logit function: } \logitf{\prob} = \logodds\text{)}
\\ &= \derivf{\logodds}{\prob}
&& \text{(Leibniz notation)}
\\ &= \frac{1}{(\prob)(1-\prob)}
&& \text{(derivative of log-odds by probability)}
\ea
$$

:::
